content.text:
You are applying a code migration fix.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/console-plugin/source/src/components/pipelines-tasks/tasks-details-pages/TaskRunDetailsStatus.tsx
Line: 40, 50, 61, 67, 80

Migration rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-descriptionlistterm]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <DescriptionListTerm> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <DescriptionListTerm> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <DescriptionListTerm variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></DescriptionListTerm>
  After:  <DescriptionListTerm variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <DescriptionListTerm> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <DescriptionListTerm><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</DescriptionListTerm>
  After:  <DescriptionListTerm icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</DescriptionListTerm>

Incident context:
  componentName: DescriptionListTerm
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: DescriptionListGroup

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: DescriptionListTerm
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
  (line 40):
   39        <DescriptionListGroup>
   40          <DescriptionListTerm>{t('Status')}</DescriptionListTerm>
   41          <DescriptionListDescription>

  (line 50):
   49          <DescriptionListGroup data-test="pipelineRun">
   50            <DescriptionListTerm>{t('PipelineRun')}</DescriptionListTerm>
   51            <DescriptionListDescription>

  (line 61):
   60        <DescriptionListGroup>
   61          <DescriptionListTerm>{t('Started')}</DescriptionListTerm>
   62          <DescriptionListDescription>

  (line 67):
   66        <DescriptionListGroup>
   67          <DescriptionListTerm>{t('Duration')}</DescriptionListTerm>
   68          <DescriptionListDescription>

  (line 80):
   79          <DescriptionListGroup data-test="pod">
   80            <DescriptionListTerm>{t('Pod')}</DescriptionListTerm>
   81            <DescriptionListDescription>


```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/console-plugin/source/src/components/pipelines-tasks/tasks-details-pages/TaskRunDetailsStatus.tsx
2. Apply ONLY the change described by the migration rule at or near line 40, 50, 61, 67, 80
3. Make the minimum edit necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your change (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Write the fixed file
6. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through the fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edit, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists the change you made, or note if the fix was already applied or could not be applied (with a brief reason).
Let me read the file first to understand the full context.

Now let me analyze the migration rule and the actual code:

**Migration rule**: In PatternFly v6, icon content in `<DescriptionListTerm>` must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children. The rule says:
- If it contains only an icon element, move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing.
- If it contains an icon AND text, move just the icon.

**Actual code at the flagged lines**:
- Line 40: `<DescriptionListTerm>{t('Status')}</DescriptionListTerm>` — text only, no icon
- Line 50: `<DescriptionListTerm>{t('PipelineRun')}</DescriptionListTerm>` — text only, no icon
- Line 61: `<DescriptionListTerm>{t('Started')}</DescriptionListTerm>` — text only, no icon
- Line 67: `<DescriptionListTerm>{t('Duration')}</DescriptionListTerm>` — text only, no icon
- Line 80: `<DescriptionListTerm>{t('Pod')}</DescriptionListTerm>` — text only, no icon

**None of these `<DescriptionListTerm>` instances contain icon elements.** They all contain only text (translation function calls). The migration rule specifically targets `<DescriptionListTerm>` elements that contain icon elements from `@patternfly/react-icons`. Since there are no icons in any of these usages, this rule does not apply to any of the flagged lines.

No changes are needed.

## Changes Applied

**No changes applied.** The migration rule targets `<DescriptionListTerm>` elements that contain icon elements from `@patternfly/react-icons`, but all five flagged instances (lines 40, 50, 61, 67, 80) contain only text children (`{t('Status')}`, `{t('PipelineRun')}`, `{t('Started')}`, `{t('Duration')}`, `{t('Pod')}`). There are no icon elements to move to the `icon` prop, so the fix does not apply to this file.
